name: SME Local De-identified Evaluation Dataset v1
description: Small synthetic and de-identified invoice and bank statement cases for local evaluation before enabling real AI providers.

deidentification.notes: All names, account identifiers, references, and amounts are synthetic and safe for local/cloud provider evaluation.

cases.notes: Outbound service invoice with a clean total that should not need review when extracted correctly.
Inbound SaaS expense invoice with multiple line items for table extraction and expense classification.
Operating account statement with one invoice payment, one SaaS expense, one advertising expense, and one rent payment.
